channel.title: GitHub Svelte Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: huntabyte/shadcn-svelte
item.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

item.title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui-lite
item.description: This repo is no longer maintained, please use our main Open WebUI repo.

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: pluja/whishper
item.description: Transcribe any audio to text, translate and edit subtitles 100% locally with a web UI. Powered by whisper models!

item.title: taikoxyz/taiko-mono
item.description: Taiko Alethia based rollup protocol 🥁 🌸

item.title: ChurchApps/FreeShow
item.description: FreeShow is a free and open-source, user-friendly presenter software.

item.title: mhkeller/layercake
item.description: graphics framework for sveltejs

item.title: mistweaverco/bananas
item.description: Bananas🍌, Cross-Platform screen 🖥️ sharing 📡 made simple ⚡.

item.title: primocms/primo
item.description: Primo is a visual CMS with a built-in code editor, Svelte blocks, and static site generator.

item.title: rishikanthc/Scriberr
item.description: Self-hosted AI audio transcription

item.title: leaningtech/webvm
item.description: Virtual Machine for the Web

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: zerebos/ghostty-config
item.description: A beautiful config generator for Ghostty terminal.

item.title: marcusolsson/obsidian-projects
item.description: Plain text project planning in Obsidian

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte
item.description: Official Svelte components built for Flowbite and Tailwind CSS

item.title: open-source-labs/Svelvet
item.description: 🎛 A Svelte library for building dynamic, infinitely customizable node-based user interfaces and flowcharts

item.title: itswadesh/svelte-commerce
item.description: The open-source storefront for any ecommerce. Built with a PWA and headless approach, using a modern JS stack. Works with Litekart, Medusa. WIP for Woocommerce, Bigcommerce and Shopify.

item.title: wobsoriano/svelte-sonner
item.description: An opinionated toast component for Svelte. A port of @emilkowalski's sonner.

item.title: reid41/QA-Pilot
item.description: QA-Pilot is an interactive chat project that leverages online/local LLM for rapid understanding and navigation of GitHub code repository.

item.title: vkurko/calendar
item.description: Full-sized drag & drop JavaScript event calendar with resource & timeline views

item.title: sveltejs/svelte.dev
item.description: The Svelte omnisite

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: threlte/threlte
item.description: 3D framework for Svelte

item.title: ThaUnknown/miru
item.description: Bittorrent streaming software for cats. Stream anime torrents, real-time with no waiting for downloads.
